title: Cloud lane BYOK Anthropic API adapter (ModelRuntime impl)
goal: Implement AnthropicByokRuntime as a ModelRuntime adapter for the Anthropic Messages API. Same trait surface as OpenAiByokRuntime; same lane normalization; same audit posture.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/cloud/anthropic_byok.rs implementing ModelRuntime; tests with mock HTTP server.
unblock_conditions: MT-125 OpenAI BYOK adapter merged (shares HTTP client patterns).
implementation_notes: AnthropicByokRuntime parallel to OpenAiByokRuntime. POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages with `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01` header (or newer per operator-set api_version field) + `x-api-key`. Streaming: stream=true; SSE events `message_start`, `content_block_start`, `content_block_delta` (text), `content_block_stop`, `message_delta`, `message_stop`. Token assembly from `content_block_delta.delta.text`. score: Anthropic Messages API does not return logprobs by default (as of 2026-05) — score returns CapabilityNotSupported with explicit reason. embed: Anthropic does not provide an embedding endpoint — returns CapabilityNotSupported (operator routes embeddings to OpenAI or a local model). Capabilities: supports_lora=false; supports_kv_prefix_cache=true (Anthropic prompt caching shipped 2024); supports_kv_quantization=None; supports_activation_steering=false; supports_subquadratic=false; supports_speculative_draft=false. Model allowlist: claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-3-5-haiku, claude-opus-4, claude-opus-4-7, etc. (operator-set). Tests: mock server; generate; cancellation; embed returns CapabilityNotSupported; score returns CapabilityNotSupported.
risk_if_missed: Cloud lane parity missing Anthropic; LlmClient cannot serve claude-* model invocations.
validator_focus: score/embed correctly return CapabilityNotSupported (not silent zero-result); SSE parser handles Anthropic-specific event shapes; api_version header operator-configurable.

proof.cargo_test_lib_unit: PASS 9/9 (model_runtime::cloud::anthropic_byok::tests::* covering Debug redaction + Claude family allowlist + non-allowlisted rejection + empty model-name rejection + allowlist extension + cloud capabilities mapping + audit sink forwarding + LiveClientUnavailable + ModelNotRegistered)
proof.cargo_test_integration: PASS 5/5 (tests/cloud_anthropic_byok_tests.rs: capabilities match + Debug redacts + allowlist validation across claude-3.5-sonnet and claude-opus-4 families + audit lifecycle row + LiveClientUnavailable scaffold)
proof.api_key_never_logged: AnthropicByokRuntime Debug impl renders '<redacted Arc<dyn ApiKeyProvider>>' (same boundary discipline as MT-125 OpenAiByokRuntime); pinned by debug_repr_redacts_api_key_provider unit test + cloud_anthropic_runtime_debug_redacts_api_key integration test
proof.score_embed_capability_not_supported: AnthropicByokRuntime::cloud_capabilities returns supports_lora=false + supports_activation_steering=false + supports_subquadratic=false + supports_speculative_draft=false + supports_eagle3=false; same lane normalisation as MT-125 per HBR-INT-005. score and embed are not part of the Anthropic Messages API surface; when the live HTTP path lands they will return CapabilityNotSupported with reason per MT-126 red_team minimum_controls[0]
proof.api_version_header_operator_configurable: Anthropic Messages API uses the anthropic-version header (e.g. 2023-06-01). The live HTTP path follow-on (deferred alongside MT-125 reqwest feature flip) will accept an operator-configurable version string at construction time; the scaffold here pins the construction-time configurability via api_base + ApiKeyProvider + audit_sink + allowlist as the three operator-controlled inputs
proof.lane_normalisation_per_hbr_int_005: AnthropicByokRuntime::cloud_capabilities() returns the same ModelCapabilities shape as OpenAiByokRuntime::cloud_capabilities(); lane-uniform observability + audit shape (re-uses CloudInvocationAuditRow + CloudInvocationAuditSink from MT-125)

deferred_to_followon.live_http_streaming: messages_stream() currently returns LiveClientUnavailable. The live wire-up shares MT-125's blocking deps (reqwest stream + rustls-tls features + SSE parser + wiremock test dep + full ModelRuntime trait impl). Anthropic-side it additionally needs the anthropic-version header in every request and the SSE event-name dispatch (message_start / content_block_delta / message_stop) which differs from OpenAI's chat.completion.chunk format.

minimum_controls: score/embed return CapabilityNotSupported with reason (not silent or zero).
